title: LPC-Associate
bio: McCoy Rasco is a LPC-Associate practicing under the supervision of Dr. Manahil Riaz (LPC-Supervisor), serving clients from our Galleria office. McCoy's primary areas of focus include LGBTQ+ Issues, Depression, and Anxiety. McCoy draws on evidence-based approaches such as Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Existential Therapy, and Psychodynamic Therapy, and offers couples therapy alongside individual sessions. McCoy works with teens (13–19) and adults (ages 20–64).
